description:
GATED ON G1 + B5.

What: When vec_map's input is a uniquely-owned VecI64 in the RC arena, mutate in place instead of allocating a fresh vec.

CLIF impact: strict reduction — removes one VecI64 alloc per uniquely-owned vec_map call.

Removes: redundant fresh allocation when input is unique.

Tests: golden CLIF on vec_map(unique_vec, f); fallback path tested for shared vecs.
title: fz-dps.G2: FBIP rewrite — vec_map in place on unique VecI64
